name: Mica
bio:
Shrine Maiden with a mission, proficient in mysterious witchcraft. She loves her mission and brings hope to people with divine power. Wearing a gorgeous shrine maiden outfit, she strengthens allies with the Divine Wood Scepter.

Role: Magical Buff
Specialty: A mid-backline Support-type hero that can strengthen allies' Defense and control enemy heroes.

skillSlots.name: Witchdoctor Guardian
skillSlots.description: Applies [Shield] to self and 1 frontline ally, absorbing 175% ATK DMG.

skillSlots.name: Exorcism Arrow
skillSlots.description: Attacks all enemies for 140% M.DMG with 30% probability to apply 1 stack of [Sigil].

effects.name: Surging Mana
effects.description: [Exorcism Arrow] heals ally with lowest HP for 30% of DMG dealt.

effects.name: Surging Mana
effects.description: [Exorcism Arrow] applies [ATK I] to self and highest-ATK ally.
